content.full_text:
October 1, 1992

Ms. Carla Wardlow  
Chief, Technical Assistance and Analysis Division  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
Post Office Box 807  
Sacramento, California 95804-0807

Re: Confirmation of Telephone Advice

Dear Carla:

This letter will confirm the telephone conversation we had today regarding our client Californians For Jobs, Not More Taxes/No on 167. I indicated to you that the No on 167 Committee made a payment to the Committee’s media buyer for radio buys on September 30, 1992; however, the media buyer will not issue any checks to the radio stations until Friday October 2, 1992 and the radio spots will not commence until Tuesday October 6, 1992. I asked what the filing responsibility of the No on 167 Committee for the report whose closing date is September 30, 1992, and filing date is October 5, 1992.

You indicated that the No on 167 Committee would be required to disclose the payment to the media vendor on its campaign statement closing September 30. You indicated that since the media buyer would not issue checks to the radio stations until October 2, that the disclosure of payments made by the media buyer would be disclosable on the next No on 167 campaign statement, namely the report due on October 22, 1992.

I would appreciate your written confirmation of our telephone conversation.

Kind regards,

Kirk Alan Pessner  
Paralegal/Administrator  
Political Reports Unit
